title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.930 - Compliance with all federal, state, and local laws and regulations
text:
313.930.  Compliance with all federal, state, and local laws and regulations. — Each licensed operator shall comply with all applicable federal, state, and* local laws and regulations, including without limitation laws and regulations applicable to tax withholdings and laws and regulations applicable to providing information about winnings and the withholding to taxing authorities.
(L. 2016 H.B. 1941 § 313.960)
*Word "and" does not appear in original rolls.
